ecs.taskdefinition.systemcontrol.CfnAbou: A list of namespaced kernel parameters to set in the container. This parameter maps to `Sysctls` in the [Create a container](https://docs.docker.com/engine/api/v1.35/

ecs.taskdefinition.systemcontrol.Namespa.Description: The namespaced kernel parameter to set a `value` for.

ecs.taskdefinition.systemcontrol.Value.Description: The namespaced kernel parameter to set a `value` for.  Valid IPC namespace values: `"kernel.msgmax" | "kernel.msgmnb" | "kernel.msgmni" | "kernel.sem" | "kernel.shmall" | "kernel.shmmax" | "kernel.shmmni" | "kernel.shm_rmid_forced"`, and `Sysctls` that start with `"fs.mqueue.*"`   Valid network namespace values: `Sysctls` that start with `"net.*"`   All of these values are supported by Fargate.
